S2.note: S2.T3 landed 2026-04-15: 3 code changes + 8 new tests. MemoryFileOut surfaces embedding_model_id+embedding_dim (blob withheld); memory_list gains offset parameter (clamp ≥0); memory_confirm becomes 7th MCP tool (manifest + dispatcher handler + _HANDLERS registry, delegates to existing files.confirm()). Tests: embedding visibility + graceful-degrade on embed failure + pagination + offset default + confirm happy path + archived→confirm invalid + not_found + confirmed→confirmed self-loop (inline reviewer fix) + full suggested→confirmed→archived state machine. 103/103 PASS, ruff clean. Reviewer 0 Criticals, 1 Major→D99 (MCP dispatcher type coercion abstraction deferred to Phase 2.5 sweep), 1 Minor (confirmed→confirmed self-loop) applied inline. ADR-V2-015 三铁律 PASS. Non-goals confirmed untouched: D12/D78/D91-D98. D78 (event embedding) 仍未落地，移到 S2.T5 或 Phase 2.5。
